name: Shrimp Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion and mushrooms in butter over a skillet until lightly browned.
2. Add salt, white pepper, red pepper, green onions, and shrimp to the skillet.
3. Pour in the dry sherry and stir gently over medium heat.
4. Simmer until the liquid reduces to a glaze, stirring occasionally.
5. Allow the mixture to cool before serving.
